summary: The diff updates the centralized branding configuration to point `BRANDING.logo` at an “Original uploaded logo” asset path, but there’s no direct evidence in the diff that all logo renderings (Header/Footer/Home hero) actually resolve to that centralized path or that other lingering references to a different logo were removed. Two non-product/meta files were also modified without being requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure all logo renderings across the frontend (Header, Footer, Home hero using BrandLogo variant="logo-with-text") resolve to the originally uploaded logo via the single source of truth in frontend/src/config/branding.ts, with no remaining references causing a different/incorrect logo to appear.
missing_requirements.reason: Only frontend/src/config/branding.ts is shown as updated. The diff summary does not show any changes to Header/Footer/Home (or BrandLogo usage) or any cleanup of other potential logo references to guarantee all renderings use BRANDING.logo.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (does not show actual code changes for Header/Footer/Home)

hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest only asks to revert the logo asset via frontend branding configuration/usage; it does not request changes to project tracking/state files.
This summary/metadata file change is not part of the requested branding/logo implementation.
